references.text: Jessop, JP. 1979. Liliaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 9: 189-235

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 305 ; Jessop, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 9 (1979) 193.
species.distribution: Africa, Andaman Isls, Bangladesh, Borneo, Cambodia, China, India, Indian Ocean, Java, Java Sea, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Madagascar, Madura, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, Nepal, Pakistan, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Thailand, Vietnam.
species.notes: In the Philippines in cultivation only as an ornamental plant.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 22 October 2017

species.citation: (L.) A.Gray ex Kunth , Enum. Pl. (Kunth) 4 (1843) 213 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 202; Jessop, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 9 (1979) 198; ≡ Melanthium indicum L. , Mant. Pl. Altera (1771) 226.
species.distribution: Australia, China, India to Thailand, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Madura, New Guinea, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sumatra. LUZON: Cavite, Laguna, NCR, Rizal, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao, Davao del Sur.
species.notes: Low and medium elevation grasslands. Rare or local. (?-)1000m.
